justification: The statement expresses grave concern over China's trade practices and calls for accountability.
Strong condemnation of China's actions in the South China Sea framed as a violation of international law.
Critical language regarding technology transfer restrictions and espionage allegations.
Expressions of concern over human rights situation in Xinjiang; calls for independent investigation.
Acknowledgement of cooperative dialogue on climate change; cautiously positive framing.
China's statement condemns US interference in internal affairs and describes sanctions as illegal unilateralism.
Sharp criticism of US military presence in the Taiwan Strait; language of sovereignty violation.
Reference to shared interests in global economic stability and willingness to engage in constructive dialogue.
Affirmation of strategic partnership; language of mutual trust and deep cooperation.
Joint statement language emphasising no-limits partnership and common vision for multipolar world.
Celebration of long-standing alliance; references to shared democratic values and deep economic integration.
Positive framing around CUSMA trade relationship and commitment to bilateral cooperation.
Condemnation of Russia's illegal invasion of Ukraine; calls for immediate withdrawal and accountability.
Announcement of additional sanctions package; language of grave concern and international law violation.
Strong expression of solidarity with Ukraine; announcement of military and financial support packages.
